settings.title: Account settings
settings.description: Manage your account, security, and other information.

form.title: Account Visibility
form.description: Choose if you want your profile to be public or private.

isPrivate.title: Private Account
isPrivate.description: When private, only your friends can see your posts, incs... This setting protects your profile and personal content.

form.title: Avatar
form.description: Update your avatar. This will be displayed on your profile.
